programme.title: Shoreditch
programme.desc: In London 1939, before the beginning of the Second World War, Thomas and his wife Massie run the Say When jazz club. But when he starts having an affair with singer Butterfly, their world disintegrates into blackmail, drugs, and suicide.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: John Cusack and Samuel L Jackson star in director Tod Williams horror, from screenplay adapted from his own novel by Stephen King. Its a normal day at Boston International Airport, with travellers on their way to and from their destinations, and airport, airline and security staff going about their business, and most of them using their mobile phones. Among them is Clay Riddell (Cusack), whos talking to his estranged wife and their young son, until his battery dies and he switches to a payphone. The inconvenience saves his life: just as his cash runs out, everyone using a mobile device around him receives an electronic pulse that causes agony and then turns them into uncontrollable ultraviolent killers. Clay narrowly escapes the mayhem and finds shelter in the paralysed subway system below the airport, where train driver Tom McCourt (Jackson) offers to lead the survivors to safety on foot. But the incident is a nationwide phenomenon, so getting out of the airport is just the start of their battle to stay alive.

programme.title: When Do We Eat?
programme.desc: A familys Passover gets screwy after the patriarch unknowingly ingests a hit of Ecstasy.

programme.title: Shaka Zulu: The Citadel
programme.desc: Prentice Mungo (David Hasselhoff) is a slave-trader who discovers that his ship is carrying a stowaway, Katherine (Karen Allen). Katherine is seeking passage to Africa to see her father, a British officer stationed there. But when they arrive, Mungo discovers Shaka, king of the Zulu tribe, among the slaves he is going to be transporting. Using his cleverness and leadership abilities, Zulu incites the slaves to revolt, and takes Katherine captive as he flees into the African countryside.

programme.title: Owd Bob
programme.desc: A teen orphan spends the summer on Isle of Man with estranged grandpa. Despite loving dogs, they want summer to end. Boy befriends neighbor girl, but her father has history with grandpa. Locals suspect neighbors dog kills sheep at night.

programme.title: The Lucky Dragon
programme.desc: A young, Chinese dragon punished by the gods to be a mere mortal is cast down to earth. He is forced to make his way in a strange land until the evil forces discover his true identity. Take part in a world full of imagination while following the journey of a mischievous dragon who has been transformed by magic into a little boy and exiled from his home to live among humans. When both good and evil forces learn that a dragon has arrived, they look for him as he is the only one who can find the magical sword—whose owner can rule the universe! Will he find the sword in time before it gets into the wrong hands? Will he ever become a dragon again?

programme.title: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Director Salvador Litvak and his writing partner, Nina Davidovich Litvak, based their screenplay on their extensive research into Lincolns friendship with Lamon. Saving Lincoln charts their relationship from their initial meeting to Lincolns Presidency. Lamon was a tall, boisterous Southerner who liked to drink whiskey, tell jokes and stories, play the banjo, and wrestle. Despite some pronounced differences between the two men, they shared a fondness for telling jokes and stories, and both felt slavery should be eliminated. Lamon often served as Lincolns private confidant.

programme.title: Lost Treasure of Jesse James
programme.desc: A backwoods team of Missouri kids race to solve a 100 year old mystery and save their friends in this family friendly action adventure. Chased deep into ancient caves they must escape treasure hunters hot on their trail or be lost forever.

programme.title: Digging Into China
programme.desc: Harriet, a ten-year old girl, lives together with her big sister and her alcoholic mother out in the countryside. The family runs a motel. Harriet is different from the others, as she owns a great creativity and has nobody to play with. Her infinite world exists only in her mind. One day, Ricky comes along. He is a grown-up, but retarded son of an elderly lady. Soon, Harriet and Ricky share their experiences of life from a different point of view and become close friends. But his mother still plans to give Ricky away into professional care in a home, because she wont live forever to be there for him.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: Epic look at Julius Caesar, Romes last dictator, whose death also signaled the end of the Roman Republic. Chronicles his campaigns in Gaul and Egypt, his rivalry with General Pompey, and his eventual assassination at the hands of Brutus and Cassius.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie (Michelle Pfeiffer), is a 40-year-old divorced mother who works as a scriptwriter and producer for a TV show You Go Girl. Rosie is insecure about her age, and uses cosmetics to maintain her appearance. She has a very close relationship with her thirteen-year-old daughter, Izzie (Saoirse Ronan), which becomes even closer when she learns that she has fallen for a boy in her class named Dylan (Rory Copus).

programme.title: The War Is Over
programme.desc: Following the bombardment of Kosovo in 1999, the Rahmanis and their three children emigrate to Switzerland. After years of living in their new homeland, the family faces the prospects of deportation. "No one is proud to be a refugee, but when it comes to me, I am not ashamed of who I am" says Rasim - the father of the family and an ex music teacher. Desperate to stay he invents an Albanian Dance Troupe in order to garner signatures of support from the community… The intimate narrative explores the experience of forced migration: the fraught decision to leave; the process of integration and adaptation to a new country; the impact on the family; and always, the yearning for the homeland.

programme.title: Spooner
programme.desc: Facing eviction from his parents home on his 30th birthday, a socially awkward guy meets the girl of his dreams and creates his own rules for growing up.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Two cop partners, who are also best friends attend a domestic disturbance, only for one to accidentaly critically wound the other. The rest of the police force are suspicious that there may have been no accident.

programme.title: Remembrance
programme.desc: Remembrance depicts a remarkable love story that blossomed amidst the terror of a German concentration camp in 1944 Poland. This impossible passion fuels the courage of a Polish prisoner who manages to rescue his Jewish girlfriend. Against all odds, they escape the camp and survive a treacherous journey to freedom. But during the chaos of the end of the war, they are forcibly separated and each is convinced that the other has died. More than thirty years later in New York, the happily married 52-year-old woman accidentally finds out that her former Polish lover is still alive. And she has to see him again.

programme.title: The 51st State
programme.desc: In Ronny Yus fast-moving crime-thriller, Samuel L Jackson plays Elmo McElroy, a pharmaceutical genius who has made a fortune in illegal drugs, particularly with Formula 51, which is more potent than heroin and crack. But instead of selling it to his drug lord employer the Lizard (Meatloaf), he flies to Liverpool where Felix (Robert Carlyle) is acting as broker for gangster Leopold Durant (Ricky Tomlinson). Durant is prepared to offer $20m for the formula; money Elmo would love to spend, if he can stay alive long enough.

programme.title: Looks That Kill
programme.desc: Max Richards, a teenage boy born with a medical condition of being lethally attractive, who is changed forever when he meets Alex, a girl with her own bizarre ailment, who aids him on his quest of self-discovery... without accidentally killing someone.

programme.title: Cleanskin
programme.desc: Harry (Sam Douglas), a British people arms dealer, is seen in bed with a prostitute named Rena (Shivani Ghai). While toying with Harrys pistol, she unloads it but replaces the empty magazine. Harrys bodyguard Ewan (Sean Bean) is a British Secret Intelligence Service. Harry and Ewan travel to a bank, transporting a briefcase of Semtex. The men are followed by two terrorists, Ash (Abhin Galeya) and Ibrahim (Mens-Sana Tamakloe). Ibrahim approaches Harry and Ewan from the top of a staircase, shooting at them. After Ash shoots Ewan twice, Harry tries to shoot Ash, only to discover there are no bullets in his gun. Ash kills Harry and takes the briefcase of Semtex. However, Ewan manages to shoot Ash in the arm; but, before he can apprehend him, Ash returns fire and escapes with the briefcase.

programme.title: Uncle Nino
programme.desc: A distant, slightly dysfunctional family is brought closer together when the fathers long-estranged Uncle Nino comes from Italy to Chicago for a surprise visit.

programme.title: Score: A Hockey Musical
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Farley has led a sheltered life, raised on a diet of home schooling, organic living and trips to the art gallery. To his parents dismay, Farley loves to play hockey with the local kids. To their even greater dismay, Farley is scouted and signed by the owner of a junior league team, where he becomes an instant star. But Farley discovers that stardom comes with a price - including the expectation to fight on the ice. Throw in a changing relationship with his best friend, and Farley finds himself losing his way.

programme.title: Railroad Tigers
programme.desc: In December 1941, Japan expands the occupation of its neighbouring countries to Southeast Asia. The railway from Tianjin to Nanjing in East China became a key military transportation route, heavily guarded by Japanese soldiers. Railroad worker Ma Yuan (Jackie Chan) leads a team of freedom fighters. Using his deep knowledge of the train network, he and his men sabotage it, ambushing Japanese soldiers and stealing supplies to feed the starving Chinese. Although the freedom fighters have no weapons of their own, they employ whatever tools are at hand, including a hammer and shovels, loose railway track planks and diverted trains. The local Chinese call the unlikely heroes the "Railroad Tigers". The freedom fighters find themselves on the wrong side of the tracks when the Japanese send reinforcements to Shandong. In an act of defiance, Ma Yuan launches his most dangerous mission yet, blowing up a heavily guarded railroad bridge. When the Japanese learn of the crippling plan, which will derail the war effort, the stakes are raised even higher. After many missed opportunities and missed shots, the bridge is blown up by the ragtag Chinese railroad tigers.

programme.title: The Adventure Scouts
programme.desc: A coming of age movie about a group of boys and girls called "adventure scouts" who return from a camping trip to discover their small town is being held captive by a gang of motorcycle-riding knuckleheads. Using only their scouting knowledge and camping equipment, the kids take down the gang members one by one, reunite with family members, and restore the communitys sense of pride.

programme.title: 10 Things We Should Do Before We Break Up
programme.desc: Abigail, a self-sufficient single mom meets Ben. They both think every great relationship ends in disaster. On the first date they come up with 10 things to do together before they break up. But the estimated end is not so sure - because fate adds #11 to their list.

programme.title: The Old Man and the Gun
programme.desc: David Lowerys crime biopic stars Robert Redford as Forrest Tucker, a real-life bank robber who found himself wanted by police across the United States for a string of prison escapes and robberies. We first meet Tucker in the early 80s. Hes 74 and has been evading police for two years since his last audacious prison break. But hes not taking things easy and laying low. Thats not his bag. This suave old geezer has a somehow enamouring way of walking into a bank, charmingly informing the teller that he has a gun that he doesnt want to use, and walking out with a big old sack of cash. In fact, hes just done exactly that when he meets Jewel (Sissy Spacek), an enchanting farmer who he quickly trusts so much that he decides to reveal to her his true identity. Tucker, alongside spending time on Jewels farm enjoying her more simplistic way of life, embarks on a string of heists. On the case is local detective John Hunt (Casey Affleck), and Tucker soon finds himself torn between the peaceful life hes enjoyed with Jewel and his old criminal ways. Also starring Danny Glover and Tom Waits.

programme.title: North and South: The Battle of New Market
programme.desc: Based on a true story of the American Civil War, culminating at the Battle of New Market, May 1864. A group of teenage cadets sheltered from war at the Virginia Military Institute must confront the horrors of an adult world when they are called upon to defend the Shenandoah Valley. Leaving behind their youth, these cadets must decide what they are fighting for.

programme.title: See You in September
programme.desc: See You in September is an original romantic comedy set in current day Manhattan. The film centers around Lindsay, a beautiful woman who seemingly has it all, but is deeply afraid of commitment. When she finds out that her therapist takes a vacation for the entire month of August she feels shocked and abandoned. Instead of taking this news lying down, Lindsay enlists the help of her acerbic best friend Monica to come up with a solution. With the assistance of "Craigs List", Lindsay puts together a group therapy session for all Manhattanites who are in need of therapy, but more importantly angry at their therapists for abandoning them.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Action movie. After years of neglect, a building-landmark will be demolished with dynamite. What a few people know is that inside it hides the cash a gang leader stole from his rivals. Will the interested parties reach the treasure in time?

programme.title: The Cooler
programme.desc: Bernie Lootz (William H. Macy) is a long-time "cooler" at the Shangri-La casino in Las Vegas: he is paid to bring his black cloud to any table where a gambler is on a roll. But when Bernies luck starts changing for the better--thanks in part to a pretty cocktail waitress--he suddenly loses his cooling talents, incurring the ire of the casino owner in the process.

programme.title: The Groomsmen
programme.desc: A 30-something man decides to marry his pregnant girlfriend and asks his four best friends to stand with him at the wedding, but as he observes his friends relationship troubles, he wrestles with issues of fatherhood, marriage and growing up.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Every ten years in an unsuspecting town, The Tournament takes place. A battle royale between 40 of the worlds deadliest assassins. The last man standing receiving the $10,000,000 cash prize and the title of Worlds No1, which itself carries the legendary million dollar a bullet price tag. All fights are monitored 24hrs a day on redirected CCTV cameras and broadcast secretly to a ring of high stake billionaire gamblers. A gritty, multistranded action-thriller, The Tournament brings together international killers from every imaginable discipline in a blood-bathed contest to the death. We follow the competition favourites through stories of love, betrayal, revenge and redemption as they finally discover the true value of life

programme.title: Hit List
programme.desc: Charlotte is a woman with anger management issues whose therapist suggests she write a journal to keep her emotions in check. Unlucky in love, she ventures online to find a boyfriend. Just as she reaches her limit of unsuccessful dates, Charlotte meets her soul mate Lyle. Everything is perfect until Lyle finds Charlottes journal and sets out to prove just how deeply he loves her.

programme.title: Rītdienas robeža
programme.desc: Zemi iekaro citplanētu iebrucēji, un pēc piecu gadu cīņām viņi ir gandrīz iekarojuši Eiropu. Ģenerālis Brigems (Brendans Glīsons) nosūta majoru Viljamu Keidžu (Toms Krūzs) kā dezertieri uz savu jauno vienību – J vadu. Jau pirmajā kaujā Keidžu nogalina, taču viņš šokēts atmostas iepriekšējā dienā. Izmisīgos centienos izlauzties no apnicīgās laika cilpas, Keidžu sāk trenēt elites kareive Rita Vrataski (Emīlija Blanta), kura ir cilvēces pretošanās simbols. Viņas vadībā Keidžs kļūst par Zemes labāko ieroci un iespēju, kā iznīcināt citplanētu iebrucējus.

programme.title: Meklēju draugu pasaules galam
programme.desc: Uzzinot par to, ka cilvēces pēdējie mēģinājumi apturēt gigantisko, Zemei tuvojošos asteroīdu ir izgāzušies, Dodžs (Karels) dodas savā pēdējā ceļojumā. Viņš grib sameklēt savu seno mīlestību, lai atklātu savas jūtas pirms pasaulei ir pienācis gals. Palīdzēt Dodžam viņa neparastajā misijā apņemas kaimiņiene Penija (Naitlija), kas tikko izšķīrusies no sava drauga-egoista. Kamēr varoņi tuvojas savam mērķim, pa ceļam vērojot nolemtās cilvēces trakulības, starp viņiem pilnīgi nevietā uzplaukst romantiskas attiecības.

programme.desc: Pavasara krāsas.

programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone filmām.

programme.title: Rītdienas robeža

Viņas vadībā Keidžs kļūst par Zemes labāko ieroci un iespēju, kā iznīcināt citplanētu iebrucējus.

programme.title: Mušpapīrs
programme.desc: Vienkāršs gājiens uz banku, lai izņemtu skaidru naudu, Tripam beidzas ar nokļūšanu gūstā pie divām bankas aplaupītāju bandām vienlaikus. Viņam nākas veikt viltīgus un drosmīgus trikus, lai atbrīvotu ķīlniekus un iekarotu klusībā mīlētās bankas darbinieces sirdi. Taču nekas nav tā, kā tas sākumā izskatās, un pārsteigumi seko viens otram.

programme.title: Meklēju draugu pasaules galam
programme.desc: Uzzinot par to, ka cilvēces pēdējie mēģinājumi apturēt gigantisko, Zemei tuvojošos asteroīdu ir izgāzušies, Dodžs (Karels) dodas savā pēdējā ceļojumā. programme.title: Kāršu skaitītājs
programme.desc: Pokerā galvenais ir saglabāt aukstasinību un spēt paredzēt pāris gājienus uz priekšu. Tieši šīs prasmes Viljams ir attīstījis līdz pilnībai. Pārliecinoši tuvojoties iespējai piedalīties Pasaules pokera sērijā un lielam naudas laimestam, viņš saprot, ka šī ir iespēja atstāt aiz muguras pagātnes noslēpumus. Taču, kad liktenis viņam piespēlē iespēju atriebties, Viljams attopas spēlē, kuras cena ir kas vairāk par naudu.

programme.title: Aizņemos līgavaini
programme.desc: Reičela ir 30 gadus veca advokāte, kura jau kopš bērnības upurējusies savas labākās draudzenes Dārsijas labā. Dārsija ir enerģiska un vienmēr pozitīva – pilnīgs pretstats nosvērtajai un nopietnajai Reičelai. Dārsija plāno precēties ar Deksu – Reičelas bijušo studiju biedru un puisi, kuru viņa jau vairākus gadus slepus mīl. Dažus mēnešus pirms kāzām Reičela un Dekss atkal satiekas, un Dekss sāk domāt par to, vai ir izvēlējies īsto meiteni. Taču vecāki uzstāj, ka viņam jāprecas pat tad, ja topošo sievu nemīl. Pa to laiku Reičelas otrs labākais draugs Ītans cenšas viņu pārliecināt, ka nevajag atteikties no laimes.

programme.title: Sasalusī zeme
programme.desc: Maniaks Roberts Hansens savus noziegumus pastrādāja XX gs. 80. gados un tiek turēts aizdomās par 20 sieviešu noslepkavošanu. Viņš aizveda savus upurus Aļaskas savvaļā, vēroja tos un pēc tam medīja kā dzīvniekus. Maniaks dzīvoja kā gluži parasts cilvēks - bija kārtīgs ģimenes tēvs, ceptuves īpašnieks un krietns mednieks. Policijas centieni aizturēt slepkavu cieta sakāvi, un tā turpinājās veselus 13 gadus. Tikai policijas seržants Džeks Halkombs nenolaiž rokas un pamazām tuvojas mērķim - slepkavību noslēpuma atminējumam.

programme.title: Bez nožēlas
programme.desc: Elitārs jūras kājinieks dodas ceļā, lai atriebtu savas sievas slepkavību, nonākot aizvien lielākās sazvērestībās.

programme.title: Holivudas blēži
programme.desc: Makss Bārbers ir viduvējs Holivudas producents, kurš reizi par visām reizēm iekūlies milzu parādos. Neredzot nekādu izeju no situācijas, viņš izstrādā viltīgu plānu, kura īstenošanai vajag tikai izlikties, ka tiek uzņemta filma un apdrošināt tās galvenā aktiera dzīvību. Filmēšanas aizsegā galvenais varonis "nejauši" ies bojā, bet Makss saņems milzīgu apdrošināšanas atlīdzību. Taču izrādās, ka novākt aktieri nemaz nav tik vienkārši, šķiet, ka viņam ir deviņas dzīvības.

programme.title: Mirdzums
programme.desc: Ģimene dodas uz nomaļu viesnīcu pārziemot, kur kāda draudīga klātbūtne ietekmē tēvu un noved viņu pie vardarbības. Viņa psihiskais dēls redz šausminošas priekšnojautas gan no pagātnes, gan nākotnes.

programme.title: Tu būsi mans dēls
programme.desc: Polam nav ticības, ka viņa dēls Martins mantos prestižo ģimenes vīna darītavu. Pols sapņo par strādīgu, veiksmīgu dēlu - sapni, kas kādu dienu, šķiet, piepildās, kad viņš satiek Filipu, sava mirstošā muižas pārvaldnieka dēlu.

programme.title: Bolero
programme.desc: 1928. gadā horeogrāfe Ida Rubinšteina Parīzē pasūtīja Morisam Ravēlam mūziku savam nākamajam baletam. Esot iedvesmas krīzē, komponists izvērtē savu dzīvi un nolemj veltīties universāla šedevra - "Bolero" - radīšanai.

programme.title: Džūlija(s)
programme.desc: Stāsts par 80 gadus vecu Jūliju, kura pārdomā lēmumus un apstākļus savā dzīvē, kas varēja viņu novest pa dažādiem ceļiem.

programme.title: Tu būsi mans dēls

programme.title: Bolero

programme.title: Vieglā uzvedība
programme.desc: Ir divdesmito gadu beigas. Britu jauneklis no turīgas ģimenes Džons Vitekers pēc īsas un kaislīgas pazīšanās Francijā apprecas ar šarmantu amerikānieti Laritu Hantingtoni. Kad jaunais pāris ierodas Džona vecāku mājās Anglijā, Larita sastopas ar vēsu un aizdomīgu vīramātes attieksmi. Atturīgajiem britiem jaunās sievietes uzvedība šķiet pārāk izaicinoša. Drīz sākas abu sieviešu cīņa - Vitekera kundze cenšas cik spēdama izēst vedeklu, taču sastopas ar asprātīgu svešinieces pretreakciju.

programme.title: Dzimumu cīņa
programme.desc: Tenisa mačs 1973. gadā starp Billiju Džīnu Kingu un Bobiju Rigsu kļuva par televīzijas vēsturē skatītājo sporta notikumu. Ierauti mediju uzmanības virpulī, Kinga un Rigss ārpus korta cīnījās ar daudzkārt svarīgākām lietām.

programme.title: Jevida
programme.desc: Gados vecāka skoltsāmu dāma Iida spiediena dēļ ir pametusi savu pagātni. Viņa izvijas cauri trim dažādiem vēstures laikmetiem, lai izpētītu Somijas pamatiedzīvotāju likteni pēckara periodā.

programme.title: Vieglā uzvedība
programme.desc: Ir divdesmito gadu beigas. Britu jauneklis no turīgas ģimenes Džons Vitekers pēc īsas un kaislīgas pazīšanās Francijā apprecas ar šarmantu amerikānieti Laritu Hantingtoni. Kad jaunais pāris ierodas Džona vecāku mājās Anglijā, Larita sastopas ar vēsu un aizdomīgu vīramātes attieksmi. Atturīgajiem britiem jaunās sievietes uzvedība šķiet pārāk izaicinoša. Drīz sākas abu sieviešu cīņa - Vitekera kundze cenšas cik spēdama izēst vedeklu, taču sastopas ar asprātīgu svešinieces pretreakciju.

programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?

programme.desc: Rudens upe.

programme.title: Jevida

programme.title: Dzimumu cīņa
programme.desc: Tenisa mačs 1973. gadā starp Billiju Džīnu Kingu un Bobiju Rigsu kļuva par televīzijas vēsturē skatītājo sporta notikumu. Ierauti mediju uzmanības virpulī, Kinga un Rigss ārpus korta cīnījās ar daudzkārt svarīgākām lietām.

programme.title: Dzimumu cīņa
programme.desc: Tenisa mačs 1973. gadā starp Billiju Džīnu Kingu un Bobiju Rigsu kļuva par televīzijas vēsturē skatītājo sporta notikumu. Ierauti mediju uzmanības virpulī, Kinga un Rigss ārpus korta cīnījās ar daudzkārt svarīgākām lietām.

programme.title: Joprojām Alise
programme.desc: Slavenās Kolumbijas Universitātes valodniecības profesores Alises Houlandas dzīve neatgriezeniski mainās brīdī, kad viņi aci pret aci sastopas ar sirdi plosošo diagnozi - agrīna Alcheimera slimība. Lai kā Alise censtos cīnīties ar slimību, viņas vīrs un trīs bērni ir liecinieki tam, kā kādreiz dzīvespriecīgā sieviete ar katru dienu arvien vairāk attālinās no reālās pasaules. Aizkustinošs stāsts par sievietes cīņu ar Alcheimera slimību, izmisumu un nolemtības sajūtu, par vīra pašaizliedzīgo mīlestību pret sievu un drosmi būt blakus, zinot, ka pienāks diena, kad Alise viņu vairs neatcerēsies. Galvenajās lomās Džūliana Mūra, Aleks Boldvins, Kristena Stjuarte.

programme.title: Laiks aiziet
programme.desc: Modes fotogrāfs ar neārstējamu vēzi izvēlas mirt viens, sagatavojot citus dzīvot pēc viņa, nevis paildzināt neizbēgamo ar ķīmijterapiju vai ļauties līdzjūtībai no tiem, kas viņu pazīst.

programme.title: Mis Saulstariņš
programme.desc: Uz ekrāniem filma par vienu visdīvainākajām ģimenēm kino vēsturē - Hūveriem. Lai piepildītu jaunākās meitas Olivas sapni piedalīties skaistuma un talantu konkursā, viņi dodas ceļā uz Kaliforniju.

programme.title: Joprojām Alise
programme.desc: Slavenās Kolumbijas Universitātes valodniecības profesores Alises Houlandas dzīve neatgriezeniski mainās brīdī, kad viņi aci pret aci sastopas ar sirdi plosošo diagnozi - agrīna Alcheimera slimība. programme.title: Kas skatāms Filmzone Plus?
programme.desc: Iepazīstinām ar Filmzone Plus filmām.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: The seven chefs meet a butcher whose family business is over three centuries old! Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini task two teams with creating a menu based around the prized Bistecca alla Fiorentina, which tests their skills like never before.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine heads to Delray Beach, Florida, to work with Bobby, the owner of Taverna Trela, in hopes of reviving the flagging clientele. Assisting Chef Robert is the culinary mastermind Jason Giovanni and his sous chef, the swarthy Leonard Persin. Faced with maybe their greatest challenge yet, Chefs Robert and Jason race against the clock to save the restaurant from falling into the hands of rival chef, Jane "the Gain Goblin" Frantzen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Battle of the Brothers
programme.desc: Three chefs have made it to the finale for their chance to take over a Voltaggio restaurant, but only two can face off for the grand prize. All that stands in their way is guest judge Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. In the epic three-course challenge to end it all, Michael and Bryan Voltaggio join forces with the two finalists to create an unforgettable meal and crown the series champion.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Crack It!. Eight bakers create crack-able desserts that represent themselves in one sweet bite. Then, the judges go on an egg hunt with their immersive Easter egg hunt cakes.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Maneets Eats
programme.desc: Maneet Chauhan makes crispy spinach and onion pakoras and saag paneer, a satisfying vegetarian meal made from curdled paneer cheese and bright greens.

programme.title: Maneets Eats
programme.desc: Chef Maneet Chauhan makes a masala omelet sandwich, with traditional Indian spices and Amul cheese, and stuffed parathas.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Tina Fey joins Ina Garten at the barn for a fun-filled day of deep conversation, breakfast custard, and a dream dinner of chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actor Christine Baranski visits Inas barn to share Broadway stories and a culinary trip to Italy. They cook Bolognese and roasted broccolini.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save Americas most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Roberts lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobbys choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobbys strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay

programme.title: Maneets Eats
programme.desc: Maneet Chauhan makes crispy spinach and onion pakoras and saag paneer, a satisfying vegetarian meal made from curdled paneer cheese and bright greens.

programme.title: Maneets Eats
programme.desc: Chef Maneet Chauhan makes a masala omelet sandwich, with traditional Indian spices and Amul cheese, and stuffed parathas.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Tina Fey joins Ina Garten at the barn for a fun-filled day of deep conversation, breakfast custard, and a dream dinner of chicken and potatoes.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actor Christine Baranski visits Inas barn to share Broadway stories and a culinary trip to Italy. They cook Bolognese and roasted broccolini.

programme.title: Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out
programme.desc: Just how far is a chef willing to go to win a cooking competition? Hosted by Brian Malarkey, Cutthroat Kitchen: Knives Out hands four chefs each $25,000 and the opportunity to spend that money on helping themselves or sabotaging their competitors. Ingredients will be thieved, utensils destroyed and valuable time on the clock lost when the chefs compete to cook delicious dishes while also having to outplot the competition. Nothing is out of bounds when money changes hands and we see just how far chefs will go to ensure they have the winning dish.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Easter
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson has the bakers use nail art patterns as inspiration for geometric tarts. Then, they model their edible Easter hats on the bunny-walk!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. Learn lots of tricks and tips with Yeh as she cooks up her personal favourite recipes for every occasion, from family visits to brunch with the girls to a classic farm supper! This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is a cookbook author who combines her country lifestyle with her Jewish and Chinese heritage to create the most delicious new dishes. A former big city girl, Yeh is multi talented, a successful blogger and classically trained musician, its food that ultimately stole her heart. This show is an absolute treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: Buried in debt, Habanera and the Guero in Houston, Texas, is on the verge of closing. The infighting is destroying the business and a 3-year-old daughter is stuck in the middle. Robert Irvine will have to convince the owner, Ben, to step back from the obsessive control of his partner and chef, Vanessa, and concentrate on the rest of the restaurant, or Ben will lose both his business and his family.

programme.title: Baking Championship: Next Gen
programme.desc: In the final challenge, the sibling teams must create delicious and stunning animated illusion cakes to win the grand prize of $25,000.

programme.title: Bakers Dozen
programme.desc: Contestants decorate beautiful miniature wedding cakes with the top five advancing. They then must impress the judges by baking their specialty. Only three finalists get to wow guest judge Loria Stern with a dessert inspired by nature!

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Networks series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of Bizarre Foods, focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how theyre prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Ciao House
programme.desc: Hosts and judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Gabe Bertaccini welcome 10 talented chefs to Ciao House, where they will live together in a beautiful Tuscan villa and be tested like never before on their proficiency with Italian cuisine. programme.title: Art. In The Shadow of War
programme.desc: In the midst of war, where silence and destruction often prevail, art rises as a powerful form of expression. This documentary series explores how artists navigate conflict, using creativity to document reality, preserve culture, and inspire hope. Through intimate stories, studio moments, and reflections on loss and resilience, it reveals how art becomes both a refuge and a form of resistance. Blending personal journeys with broader cultural context, the series highlights the enduring strength of human creativity in the darkest of times.

By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

The program combines entertainment with useful insights, helping audiences discover innovative ways to enhance comfort, style, and functionality at home.

programme.title: Antizombies
programme.desc: Viewers are guided through the world of media and information, learning how to identify fake news, misinformation, and manipulative content. Each episode combines analysis, real-life examples, and practical tips to develop critical thinking skills. The program encourages audiences to question sources, verify facts, and approach information thoughtfully, promoting media literacy and responsible consumption of news in daily life.

programme.title: Civil Defense
programme.desc: Viewers receive detailed information on civil defense, emergency response, and personal safety. Each episode explores practical measures for disaster preparedness, first aid, and risk management, offering step-by-step guidance. By following the program, audiences gain knowledge and skills to respond effectively to emergencies, protect themselves and others, and build resilience in their communities during critical situations.

programme.title: Ethnicities
programme.desc: Audiences are introduced to the lives of ordinary people, exploring their personal stories, struggles, and accomplishments across different communities in Ukraine. Episodes cover social issues, cultural traditions, and local initiatives, providing a rich and engaging portrayal of daily life. The program emphasizes the resilience, creativity, and perspectives of individuals, offering viewers insight into the human dimension behind societal events and trends.

programme.title: The Last Day of the Dictator
programme.desc: The program delves deeply into the last days of a dictators rule, examining political conflicts, social unrest, and decisive moments that led to the fall of authority. Episodes provide detailed narratives of government decisions, protests, and personal accounts, offering viewers insight into the human, political, and societal consequences of authoritarian regimes. By exploring these events, audiences gain a comprehensive understanding of power, resistance, and the dramatic processes that shape history.

programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Sliktais leitnants
programme.desc: Glābjot pēc viesuļvētras Katrīna cietuma kamerā iesprostotu cietumnieku, Jaunorleānas policijas seržants Terenss Makdona ieguva apbalvojumu, paaugstinājumu par leitnantu, muguras ievainojumu, kas sāpēs visu atlikušo dzīvi, un pieeju sāpes remdējošām zālēm. Reiz Terenss bija tiešām labs policists, bet nu viena nepareiza izvēle ved pie nākamās, līdz beidzot ne tikai Terensa karjera, bet arī viņa paša dzīvība izrādās briesmās.

programme.title: Arkādija
programme.desc: Nikolass Keidžs atveido tēvu, kurš pasaules gala laikā, nomaļā lauku sētā, kopā ar saviem dvīņu puikām cīnās par izdzīvošanu.

programme.title: Jauns sākums
programme.desc: Greta un viņas draugs Deivs ir muzikanti un dziesmu autori, kopā jau ilgus gadus kopš koledžas laikiem. Brīdī, kad Deivs saņem piedāvājumu ierakstīt albumu no lielas ierakstu kompānijas, viņi pārvācas uz dzīvi Ņujorkā. Jauniegūtās slavas savaldzināts, Deivs pamet Gretu un uzsāk savu jauno mūziķa karjeru. Gretas dzīvē pozitīvu pavērsienu ienes nejauša satikšanās ar Denu, izbijušu ierakstu kompānijas menedžeri. Brīdī, kad Dens ierauga Gretu muzicējam nomaļā pilsētas klubā, viņu vienā mirklī apbur meitenes muzikālais talants un šarms. Līdz ar šo nejaušo sastapšanos abu dzīves ir nesaraujami saistītas, ļaujot sadziedēt brūces un sasniegt mērķus gan profesionālajā karjerā, gan privātajā dzīvē. Jauns dzīves sākums izstāstīts uz Ņujorkas vasaras fona.

programme.title: Bestsellers
programme.desc: Untumains pensionēts rakstnieks negribīgi sāk piedalīties savas pēdējās grāmatas veicināšanas kampaņā, lai izpalīdzētu jaunai izdevējai.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Baksteru ģimene pārceļas uz dzīvi citā štatā, taču 10 gadus veco Finnu biedē jaunā māja, jo viņš uzskata, ka tajā spokojas. Kamēr puisēns izliek slazdus, lai notvertu "spoku", viņa vecāki aizkavējas citā pilsētas malā, un viņš paliek mājās kopā ar māsu. Tikmēr trīs zagļi vēlas iegūt ārkārtīgi dārgu gleznu, kuru bijušais īpašnieks paslēpis slepenā telpā. Vai viņiem izdosies iegūt kāroto un uzvarēt kaujā ar mazo gudrinieku?

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Ir pagājuši pieci gadi, kopš Hiks un Nezobs veiksmīgi apvienoja pūķus un vikingus uz Berkas salas. Kamēr Astrīda, Snūģis un pārējie sacenšas pūķu sacīkstēs (kas ir salas iemītnieku mīļākais sporta veids), nešķiramie draugi iepazīst apkārtni, veidojot līdz šim neatklāto teritoriju karti un atklājot jaunas pasaules. Kārtējā piedzīvojuma laikā viņi atklāj slepenu ledus alu, kur mīt vairāki simti savvaļas pūķu un noslēpumainais Pūķu Jātnieks. Hiku un Nezobu ierauj kaujā par miera saglabāšanu pasaulē. Tagad viņiem jācīnās par to, kam viņi tic, un tikai kopīgiem spēkiem draugi spēs mainīt cilvēku un pūķu nākotni.

programme.title: Minioni
programme.desc: Minjoni, kas attīstījās no dzelteniem vienšūnas organismiem, dzīvo uz Zemes kopš aizvēsturiskiem laikiem. Viņu dzīves jēga ir kalpošana, taču mazie radījumi nemitīgi atrod sev nekam nederīgus saimniekus, sākot no dinozaura un beidzot ar Napoleonu. Ja minjoniem nav saimnieka, kuram zemoties, viņi ieslīgst dziļā depresijā. Taču minjonam Kevinam ir plāns – kopā ar draugiem Stjuartu un Bobu viņš dodas meklēt jaunu ļauno saimnieku, kuram sekot. Tā viņi atrod Skārletu Nomušītu, kas ir pasaulē pirmā superļaundare.

programme.title: Mis Moksi
programme.desc: Mis Moksi, pieradināta kaķenīte, brīvdienu laikā apmaldās, un viņai nākas atrast ceļu atpakaļ uz mājām, ceļojot cauri Dienvideiropai kopā ar, kaķa skatījumā, visnepatīkamākajām radībām, kādas vien iespējamas, – komisku suni un vecu, gudru putnu. Šī ceļojuma laikā viņa paplašina savu skatījumu uz dzīvi un atklāj patieso draudzības nozīmi.

programme.title: Mošķu ģimenīte
programme.desc: Kas jauns mošķu pasaulē? Kāzas! Ragana un viņas iemīļotais Renfīlds, grāfa Drakulas sulainis, nolēmuši neslēpt savas jūtas un... salaulāties! Taču nupat sākusies laulību ceremonija tūdaļ pārtrūkst. Viesu acu priekšā mīlētājus nolaupa ar pārcilvēciskām spējām apveltītā mošķu medniece Mila. Šai mazulītei labāk netuvoties. Viņa ir ātrāka par vēju un apgādāta ar vismodernākajām tehnoloģijām - tās ieraugot, pat Džeimss Bonds viņu apskaustu.

programme.title: Panda Mēness
programme.desc: Pēc sliktām atzīmēm 12 gadus vecais Tiaņs tiek nosūtīts pie vecmāmiņas uz attāliem Ķīnas kalniem. Tur viņš sadraudzējas ar pandu, kuru nosauc par Mēnesi, un šī draudzība aizsāk neparastu piedzīvojumu, kas izmaina viņa ģimenes dzīvi.

programme.title: Van Gogs. Pie mūžības vārtiem
programme.desc: Gleznotāja Van Goga dzīvesstāsts par laiku, ko viņš pavadīja Francijā, Arlā.

programme.title: Līdz uzvaras vārtiem
programme.desc: Bez darba palikušais un alkoholu mīlošais futbola treneris Tomass Rongens dodas uz Amerikāņu Samoa, lai vadītu izlasi un palīdzētu tai sagatavoties Pasaules čempionāta atlases sacensībām. Galvenā problēma valstsvienības pastāvēšanas vēsturē: tā vēl ne reizi nav iesitusi nevienus vārtus un spēles laikā ir uzstādījusi antirekordu futbola vēsturē - 31 reizi vienas spēles laikā bumba ielaista viņu vārtos. Tomasu sagaida grūts darbs ne tikai ar komandu, bet arī pašam ar sevi.

programme.title: Ceļojošā Pils
programme.desc: Kad Sofija tiek pārvērsta par sirmgalvi, viņa bēg no pilsētas un atrod patvērumu Houla maģiskajā pilī. Starp lidojošām pilsētām un kara draudiem viņa atklāj mīlestību un drosmi. Studijas "Ghibli" šedevrs ir sirsnīga un burvīga pasaka.

programme.title: Motobraucēji
programme.desc: Pēc nejaušas tikšanās pārgalvīgo Ketiju piesaista Benijs, Vidusrietumu motokluba "Vandals" biedrs. Klubam pārtopot par bīstamu vardarbības perēkli, Benijam ir jāizvēlas starp Ketiju un viņa lojalitāti klubam.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: Stāsts par pasaules pirmā viedtālruņa galvu reibinošajiem panākumiem un katastrofālo kritienu.

programme.title: Līdz pēdējam
programme.desc: Filmu "Amerikāņu skaistums" un "Optimista stāsts" veidotāji piedāvā uz patiesiem notikumiem balstītu stāstu par leģendāro bokseri Viniju Pacienca, kurš 1991. gadā cieta smagā autokatastrofā, gūstot smagu mugurkaula traumu. Kamēr ārsti nesolīja neko labu un ieteica Vinijam aizmirst par sportista karjeru, viņš pilnīgā slepenībā sāka apmeklēt sporta zāli un jau pēc trim mēnešiem atgriezās ringā.

programme.title: Advokāts
programme.desc: Veiksmīgais advokāts ir sasniedzis savas karjeras augstāko punktu un atradis liktenīgo sievieti, ar kuru vēlas drīz precēties. Viņa mierīgo dzīvi iztraucē senas paziņas lūgums. Piekrītot šim piedāvājumam, advokātam nāksies pieņemt lēmumus, kas neatbilst viņa principiem un morāles normām. Viņš vēl nemaz nenojauš, ka, iesaistoties amorālajā narkobiznesā, viņa dzīve izmainīsies līdz nepazīšanai. Filmā piedalās krāšņs aktieru ansamblis - Maikls Fasbenders, Penelope Krusa, Kemerone Diasa, Havjers Bardems un Breds Pits.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Vikingu pusaudzis Hikaps dzīvo Berkas salā kopā ar savu valdonīgo tēvu. Kaujas ar pūķiem ir vikingu ikdiena un dzīves veids, taču Hikapu tās neaizrauj. Tā vietā viņš labprātāk nododas visvisādiem izgudrojumiem un apkārtnes iepazīšanai. Reiz kādā no saviem klejojumiem Hikaps sastop ievainotu pūķi, kuram palīdz atkal lidot. Šī sastapšanās maina abu dzīves. Un, kad pienāk iesvētību laiks – lielā iespēja kaujā ar pūķiem sevi pierādīt tēvam un visai ciltij –, Hikaps rīkojas pavisam neparasti.

programme.title: Žanna Dibarī. Karaļa favorīte
programme.desc: Stāsts par karaļa Luija XV pēdējo oficiālo mīļāko Dibarī kundzi.

programme.title: Džūdija
programme.desc: Biogrāfiska drāma par izcilās ASV dziedātājas un aktrises Džūdijas Gārlendas dzīvi. Gārlenda 1968. gadā, gadu pirms savas nāves, devās uz Eiropu, lai koncertētu Londonā. Filmā attēloti pēdējie mēneši kinozvaigznes dzīvē, pirms viņa izdarīja pašnāvību.

programme.title: Pēdējais ceļojums
programme.desc: Filips un Fredriks, pazīstams Zviedrijas TV duets, dodas ceļojumā uz Franciju ar mērķi atjaunot dzirksti Filipa tēva dzīvei.

programme.title: Marmelāde
programme.desc: Filma par kādu ieslodzīto, kurš ar savu veiklo kameras biedru dalās paša izdomātā krāšņā, romantiskā bankas aplaupīšanas stāstā un izbēg, apvienojoties ar savas dzīves mīlestību.

programme.title: Palaidnīgā feja
programme.desc: gadus jaunajai zobu fejai Violetai maģija nešķiet īpaši aizraujoša, tāpēc viņa vienīgā nespēj nokārtot eksāmenu, lai iegūtu kristālu, kas fejām ļauj iekļūt cilvēku pasaulē. Violeta neļauj skumjām vaļu, nozog kristālu citai fejai un nokļūst 12 gadus vecās bārenītes Maksijas istabā. Tomēr, ak vai! Kristāls saplīst, un nu Violeta ir iesprostota cilvēku pasaulē! Kopā ar Maksiju viņa meklē atpakaļceļu un atklāj savu patieso aicinājumu.

programme.title: Madagaskaras pingvīni
programme.desc: Bezbailīgie pingvīni Kapteinis, Kovalskis, Riko un Ierindnieks, kuri ir labākie spiegi, kādi jebkad izšķīlušies no olas, apvieno spēkus ar smalku slepeno organizāciju "Ziemeļvējš". Izskatīgā un brašā aģenta Slepenā vadībā viņiem kopā jāaptur ļaunais doktors Oktāvijs Brīze, kurš ir nodomājis iznīcināt pasauli.

programme.title: Runcis zābakos
programme.desc: Vēl pirms leģendārais Runcis Zābakos satiek mums visiem jau zināmo zaļo briesmoni, vārdā Šreks, viņš dodas varonīgiem piedzīvojumiem pilnā ceļojumā, lai kopā ar ideju meistaru Oliņu Aleksandru Boliņu un drosmīgo kaķenīti Kitiju Maigķepu nozagtu Zosi, kas dēj zelta olas. Tas tik būs viens varens un deviņu dzīvību vērts piedzīvojums!

programme.title: Grāmatu zagle
programme.desc: Filma "Grāmatu zagle", kuras pamatā ir pasaulē populārs romāns, ir stāsts par neparastu, enerģisku meiteni, kuru Otrā pasaules kara laikā Vācijā nosūta dzīvot audžuģimenē. Meiteni ieintriģē vienīgā grāmata, ko viņa paņēmusi līdzi, tāpēc viņa sāk kolekcionēt grāmatas. Ar savu jauno vecāku un zem kāpnēm mītošā slepenā viesa palīdzību meitene iemācās lasīt un izveido brīnumainu pasauli, kas iedvesmo viņus visus.

programme.title: Nezvēri
programme.desc: No dzimtenes izceļojis franču pāris Spānijas laukos vada organisko saimniecību, taču rodas nesaskaņas ar vietējiem ciemata iedzīvotājiem.

programme.title: Ēnu spēle
programme.desc: Treviss Bloks ir FIB problēmu risinātājs. Kad slepenie aģenti nonāk nepatikšanās, Treviss tiek izsaukts, lai viņus izpestītu. Par katru cenu. Taču, kad viens no slepenajiem aģentiem apšauba savas priekšniecības patiesos mērķus, Treviss nonāk asiņainas sazvērestības epicentrā.

programme.title: Barijs Sīls: Īstens amerikānis
programme.desc: Stāsts par Bariju Sīlu, amerikāņu lidmašīnas pilotu, kurš iefiltrējās narkotiku kartelī CIP slepena uzdevuma ietvaros 20. gs. 80. gados, kas tiek atmaskots kā pret Irānu vērsta militāra operācija.

programme.title: Viktorīnu lēdija
programme.desc: Anna ir gudra un aizrautīga televīzijas viktorīnu dalībniece. Kad viņas māte iekrīt pamatīgos parādos, Annai nākas apvienot spēkus ar māsu Dženiju, no kuras viņa laika gaitā atsvešinājusies. Situācija sarežģījas vēl vairāk, kad tiek nolaupīts Annas suns un par viņu pieprasīta izpirkuma maksa. Abām māsām neatliek nekas cits kā doties trakā ceļojumā pāri Amerikas Savienotajām Valstīm ar vienu mērķi: padarīt Annu par neapstrīdamu televīzijas viktorīnu čempioni, lai iegūtu tik ļoti nepieciešamo naudu!

programme.title: UFC. Gilbert Burns-Mike Malott
programme.desc: Martial Arts based TV programme. UFC stands for the Ultimate Fighting Championship which is an American mixed martial arts (MMA) promotion company based in Las Vegas that is owned by William Morris Endeavour.The purpose of UFC fighting was to establish the most effective martial art in a contest that had no weight classes and minimal rules that were as follows: no biting, hair pulling, groin shots and eye gouging. Legendary fighters well known for their ability to win in UFC fighting are Anderson Silva, Brock Lesnar, Connor McGregor and Ken Shamrock. Womens MMA has seen Ronda Rousey defend her title from 2012 to 2015 before she was defeated by Holly Holm another belt holder in more than one martial art.

programme.title: NBA. Play-offs: Thunders - Suns
programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. Due to its popularity, this is one of four major professional sport leagues available in the United States of America and Canada. Furthermore, research suggests that it is widely considered to be the premier mens basketball league in the world. Legends of this particular sport include Kobe Bryant, Michael Jordan and Kareem Abdul-Jabbar.

programme.title: Basketbols: ACB league. Real Madrid - Tenerife
programme.desc: Tune in and follow all the matches from the ACB League, also known as the Endesa League for sponsorship reasons, the top-tier mens basketball league in Spain.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Real Madrid - Alaves
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera Division) is the mens top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda Division and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Teniss: ATP 500 Munich. Vienspēles. Fināls
programme.desc: The ATP 250 Munich is an annual mens tennis tournament held on the iconic clay courts of Munich, Germany. As part of the ATP 250 series, it ranks among the smaller events on the ATP Tour calendar, but it remains just as thrilling and competitive.

programme.title: Futbols: Bundesliga. Bayern - Stuttgart
programme.desc: Germany has the most attended football league in the world, in the Bundesliga. We bring these authentic fab experiences to your living room with all the key moments of the 2019-20 season, to ensure that your appetite for German football is well and truly met. The likes of Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich are met with stern competition this season, as RB Leipzig look to build on their third-placed finish from last season. This programme brings all the games of the german top-flight into one place, so that you can easily catch up with the weeks action. As we reach the business end-of-the-season, watch the victors and losers dictate the final table. With relegation spots and Champions League places yet to be decided, it promises to be a rather exciting conclusion for all those concerned.

Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo are back with new ideas for turning outdated homes into jaw-dropping, innovative living spaces. Having expanded their business (and their family), the Gaineses now juggle more while renovating, which keeps things unpredictable.

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: First Home Fix
programme.desc: Raisa and Austin renovate a Cliff May home to fit a couples modern lifestyle, and the historic house presents plenty of budget challenges.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: An active couple is relocating to Indian Lake, OH, to spend more time on their boat with family and friends. Theyre searching for a move-in ready home with direct water access to the lake and a large yard for their dog.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you dont have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfronts in USA, looking for homes that wont break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: House Hunters

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tareks picture-perfect wife, who Tareks friends still cant believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, well follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A young couple with a baby is ready for a lifestyle change with a move to Long Beach, NY. They want an oasis outside of Manhattan thats close to the beach, has plenty of space and has easy access to trains for their commute.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: With her two kids out of the house, a CPA is packing up her life and moving to Ventnor City, NJ. She wants to downsize with a home thats close to the beach and boardwalk so she can enjoy the entertainment.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, theyre keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erins imaginative hand sketches to Bens custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small towns future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo are back with new ideas for turning outdated homes into jaw-dropping, innovative living spaces. Having expanded their business (and their family), the Gaineses now juggle more while renovating, which keeps things unpredictable.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Licensed real estate agent Page Turner meets with struggling flippers to tour mid-flip properties that are in hopeless financial situations. Page invests her own money to help the floundering flippers fix everything from blown budgets and mismanaged schedules to uninspired upgrades and lackluster design.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: A father and daughter flipping duo [Juan and Allison in Huntington Beach] have made small profits on past projects, and are currently in a stalemate on how to finish a very pricey flip. Page pushes them out of their comfort zone with design so they can finally turn some real money.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programme.desc: After purchasing their bungalow, homeowners are left defeated and overwhelmed following a year of endless leaks and shocking electrical issues. Mike, Sherry, and Michael step in to help and must deal with insufficient waterproofing and dangerous wiring.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: Follow one family as they ditch the hustle and bustle and go on a journey to find the quintessential escape in Log Cabin Living . Theyll navigate this unusual real estate market as they search for their perfect log home retreat. From access to everyday necessities, entertainment and recreational activities, to a whole new set of maintenance requirements, will they trade predictable living for a chance to live out their wildest dreams in a secluded log cabin?

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: A couple looks for a log cabin getaway in the mountains of Arizona. Theyre hoping to get their busy family of six to relax and enjoy riding ATVs in the small town of Payson, AZ. He would love a cabin with a rustic mountain feel while shes looking for a spacious setting where they can host family and friends. With the help of a local realtor, they hope to find the perfect retreat from the heat of the city.

programme.title: Log Cabin Living
programme.desc: A family of four is looking to move from their current home in the city of Lynchburg, VA, to the nearby countryside where they will have more room to explore and become immersed in nature. He grew up visiting his grandmother in her log cabin and wants his children to have that experience as well. Shes hoping to find a home with an updated kitchen and an open concept, and hes looking for a detached garage. Its a hefty wish list but their realtor is ready to help them find the perfect log home.

programme.desc: Families who achieved their dreams of buying an affordable vacation home are now tasked with the tough job of turning it into the relaxing oasis they envisioned when they purchased it. In each episode of Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation , watch as they work together to transform their new properties into a home away from home, proving that with a little imagination and a lot of muscle, you can have the relaxing getaway youve always wanted.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Designing duo Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent help moving families get a fresh start. They aid their clients in letting go of what they no longer need before renovating the property into the perfect dream home for the familys next stage of life.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Designing duo Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent help moving families get a fresh start. They aid their clients in letting go of what they no longer need before renovating the property into the perfect dream home for the familys next stage of life.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. Jasmine brings in the professionals to rescue these renovations-gone-wrong and helps homeowners realise their propertys full potential. With half-demolished houses, unfinished floors and plumbing nightmares: these refurbishment mishaps are on a monumental scale. Luckily, with expertise, hard work and vision, Jasmine and her team can hopefully transform these DIY disasters into something beautiful that their owners will love.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home International
programme.desc: British interior designer Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen joins European lottery winners as they hunt for a dream home. From exotic castles to refurbished cottages, Laurence helps them get their foot in the real estate market across the United Kingdom and Europe.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison Victoria returns where her design career started to the bright lights and high stakes of Las Vegas! Shes betting on lofty rewards, taking on multi-million-dollar projects and risky flips as she looks to expand her successful design business.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. The budget is set, so the guys must be persuasive to score a bigger chunk of the dollars to either max out the interiors or make the most of the outdoor spruce up.

programme.title: The Renovator
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis assists a couple living in his former bachelor pad thats in need of serious upgrades. He transforms the interior and exterior to create a forever home.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. Well follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but well prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".
